text.title: Caching Strategy Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure from raw input to validated caching-strategy artefact.

step.name: declare-invalidation
step.action: Pick mode: ttl-only (acceptable staleness), write-through (write-side owns cache), pubsub-event (cross-service write).

step.name: wire-single-flight
step.action: Wrap miss path with single-flight primitive; verify only one in-flight load per key.

step.name: instrument-and-alert
step.action: Export hit_rate; configure alert below hit_rate_target. Emit CACHE-* artefact.
